title: Deploy and maintain data pipelines and workloads with Azure Databricks
summary: Master the complete lifecycle of building, deploying, and maintaining production-ready data pipelines in Azure Databricks—from design and orchestration to monitoring and optimization.

sections.title: Deploy and maintain data pipelines and workloads with Azure Databricks
sections.summary: Master the complete lifecycle of building, deploying, and maintaining production-ready data pipelines in Azure Databricks—from design and orchestration to monitoring and optimization.

lessons.title: Design and implement data pipelines with Azure Databricks
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to design and implement robust data pipelines using Lakehouse architecture principles, medallion architecture, and Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines in Azure Databricks.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/design-implement-data-pipelines/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Design and implement data pipelines with Azure Databricks

lessons.title: Implement Lakeflow Jobs with Azure Databricks
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to create, configure, schedule, and monitor Lakeflow Jobs in Azure Databricks to automate your data pipelines.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-lakeflow-jobs/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement Lakeflow Jobs with Azure Databricks

lessons.title: Implement development lifecycle processes in Azure Databricks
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement development lifecycle processes in Azure Databricks, including Git version control, branching strategies, testing approaches, and Declarative Automation Bundle deployment using the CLI.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-development-lifecycle-processes-in-azure-databricks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement development lifecycle processes in Azure Databricks

lessons.title: Monitor, troubleshoot and optimize workloads in Azure Databricks
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to monitor cluster consumption, troubleshoot job failures, diagnose Spark performance issues, and implement log streaming to Azure Log Analytics for centralized monitoring of Azure Databricks workloads.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/monitor-troubleshoot-optimize-workloads-azure-databricks/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Monitor, troubleshoot and optimize workloads in Azure Databricks

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Deploy and maintain data pipelines and workloads with Azure Databricks
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Deploy and maintain data pipelines and workloads with Azure Databricks**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
